productDisplayName: Red Tape Men's Dark Brown Oxford Formal Shoe
description: Stylish to the T, these dress shoes from red tape are perfect for all formal occasions. Slip into these oxfords to look like you mean business. The pointed toe silhouette adds to the charm of these shoes. Wear them to look suave in a jiffy! A great addition to any sophisticated man's wardrobe, it can add tons of character to your outfit in an instant.Upper Full-grain leather upper for added durability and style Pointed toe design with stitch detailing for a more stylish look Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized Fit Softly padded tongue to protect from excessive  rubbing and prevent blisters Leather wrap-around overlay along the heel and midfoot for better support Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and support Leather inner to absorb moisture and keep feet dry Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style Multi-directional circular textured pattern on the forefoot for improved traction Herringbone pattern on the heel for better grip shoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shineDo not store in direct sunlight
